rationale: Educ. Code §5.002 defines 'textbook' as 'instructional material' for purposes of the education title. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: In this title, a reference to a textbook means instructional material, as defined by Section 31.002.
_note: No relationship between the cited education-code definitional provision and the proposed homestead exemption increase.
